channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Voici l’intérieur de la nouvelle voiture électrique chinoise de Volkswagen en partenariat avec Xpeng : l’ID. Unyx 08
item.description: Volkswagen dévoile l'intérieur de son grand SUV électrique baptisé ID.Unyx 08 destiné au marché chinois. Un modèle ambitieux sur le papier, qui assume pleinement ses origines technologiques venues tout droit d'un constructeur chinois, à savoir XPeng.

item.title: Lenovo LOQ RTX 5050 laptop gets a huge £300 discount in Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale — with a Core i5 processor, 24GB RAM, and 1TB SSD
item.description: Lenovo LOQ is a powerful laptop for creatives, students, and power users — and it’s £300 (25%) off in Amazon’s Spring Deal Days sale right now.

item.title: Google brings Gemini-powered content creation tools to Docs, Sheets, Slides and Drive
item.description: Google is rolling out a batch of Gemini updates across its Workspace apps that give the AI assistant the ability to generate first drafts in Docs, build entire spreadsheets in Sheets, design presentations in Slides and answer questions about files stored in Drive. The features started rolling out on March 10 in beta for Google AI Ultra and Pro subscribers and Gemini Alpha business customers, in English only. In Docs, a new "Help me create" tool produces a formatted first draft by pulling context from Drive, Gmail, Chat and the web based on a user's prompt. Gemini can also match the writing sty...

item.title: Galatasaray vs Liverpool Free Streams: How to watch Champions League 2025/26 Round of 16 1st leg from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Galatasaray vs Liverpool live streams for free, with Arne Slot's side seeking revenge in Istanbul in the Champions League last 16 1st leg.

item.title: « Trop de coïncidences » : Microsoft force-t-il les mises à jour vers Windows 11 25H2 sans autorisation ?
item.description: De plus en plus d'utilisateurs racontent que leur PC s'est mis à jour vers Windows 11 25H2 sans leur accord. Certains y voient un bug, d'autres une volonté de Microsoft.

item.title: Want to store up to 32TB in a paperback-sized NAS? The TerraMaster F4 SSD is on sale right now for Amazon's Spring Deal Days
item.description: The TerraMaster F4 SSD is a fast, compact storage upgrade for just £368 — a great option for anyone building a reliable home or small-office NAS.

item.title: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon, c’est le bon moment pour changer son smartphone : voici le TOP 6 des deals à retenir
item.description: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon font aussi baisser le prix des smartphones. Tous les modèles y passent : du Google Pixel 10 à prix cassé, au tout nouveau Galaxy S26 Ultra, en passant par le Xiaomi 17 qui bénéficie lui aussi d’une belle remise. Ces promotions sont l’occasion parfaite de vous équiper à prix réduit.

item.title: Après la crise de son app, Sonos relance la machine avec deux nouvelles enceintes
item.description: Après une séquence très compliquée durant laquelle Sonos a surtout passé son temps à réparer les pots cassés de son application, le spécialiste de l'audio connecté lance finalement de nouveaux produits pour le grand public. Au menu : deux enceintes, les Sonos Play et Era 100 SL.

item.title: GrapheneOS vs le reste du monde : la guerre des ROMs Android est relancée
item.description: Vous essayez d'utiliser votre application bancaire sur un smartphone dégooglisé et tout bloque ? C'est le quotidien frustrant des utilisateurs de ROMs alternatives. Mais alors que certains tentent de contourner le verrou de Google, les développeurs de GrapheneOS accuse ouvertement Volla, Murena et Iodé de mentir sur leur niveau de sécurité réel.

item.title: Watch out Microsoft Teams users - hackers are spreading a dangerous new phishing scam, here's what we know
item.description: Hackers are pretending to be solving a spam problem but are actually deploying backdoors.

item.title: Legora reaches $5.55 billion valuation as AI legaltech boom endures
item.description: Legora, an AI platform for lawyers, is now valued at $5.55 billion following a $550 million Series D led by Accel to fuel its growth in the U.S.

item.title: Meta acquired Moltbook, the AI agent social network that went viral because of fake posts
item.description: Meta says that Moltbook's approach to "connecting agents through an always-on-directory" is novel.

item.title: Sony is reportedly testing dynamic pricing on its PlayStation storefront that changes the price tag of over 190 games
item.description: Sony has been reportedly testing dynamic pricing on the PlayStation Store for months, offering users in certain regions huge discounts on first and third-party games.

item.title: Alerte offre inédite pour Google Pixel 10 Pro XL : plus de 40 % de remise sur Amazon
item.description: Le Google Pixel 10 Pro XL n’a jamais été aussi abordable sur Amazon : affiché à 749 au lieu de 1 299 euros. Une occasion de mettre la main sur l’un des meilleurs photophones Android du marché, alliant puissance, design épuré et IA poussée.

item.title: The TCL C6K is 'a cheap mini-LED TV that's very good value for money' — and now it's down to a record-low price
item.description: Budget TVs don't get much better than the TCL C6K, delivering excellent performance for a low price — and it's now even cheaper in Amazon's Spring Sale.

item.title: 1 400 km d’autonomie, recharge en 10 minutes, moteurs électriques puissants : voici toutes les annonces de Renault, Dacia et Alpine
item.description: Renault vient de frapper un grand coup sur la voiture électrique : 1 400 km d'autonomie, recharge en 10 minutes et coûts en baisse de 40 %. Voici ce qu'il faut savoir sur les annonces de ce 10 mars 2026 pour Renault, Dacia et Alpine.

item.title: I reviewed the MacBook Neo, ask me anything
item.description: It's MacBook Neo review day, so let's talk Apple's new $599 laptop. I'm going to host another AMA for Verge subscribers today at 11AM PT / 2PM ET. Like last time, it'll all take place in the comments section of this post. What do you want to know about the MacBook Neo? I've got the […]

item.title: Les Renault électriques seront plus rapides sur longs trajets grâce à ce puissant moteur électrique sans terre rare
item.description: Renault travaille à un nouveau moteur électrique sans terres rares qui éliminerait le grand point faible de la génération actuelle, l'autoroute, en diminuant la consommation à haute vitesse et les temps de charge, tout en étant plus économique à produire. Il devrait arriver sur les prochaines Mégane et Scénic électriques.

item.title: La dernière mise à jour des smartphones Pixel ralentit fortement la charge, mais est-ce vraiment un bug ?
item.description: Depuis le Pixel Drop de mars, de nombreux détenteurs d'un smartphone Google constatent que la recharge semble s'arrêter à 77 % avant de continuer très lentement. Bug ou pas ?

item.title: 21 super Lego sets to add to your Mario collection on Mar10 Day
item.description: These Boo-tiful sets will look pretty as a Peach on your shelves.

item.title: A Resident Evil Requiem story expansion is in the works
item.description: It takes around 30 hours to experience everything Resident Evil Requiem has to offer. If you've already enjoyed all the thrills and spills and you're itching for more, there's some positive news. Capcom has some updates on the way. The biggest of those is a story expansion, which is now in development. Just don't expect it to arrive imminently."In this story, we will delve deeper into the world of Requiem," game director Koshi Nakanishi said in a short video message. "We’re hard at work on it now. It will take some time, so we ask for your patience and hope you’ll look forward to it."A message...

item.title: Ericsson US reveals employee and customer data breach after third-party hack
item.description: An unnamed threat actor stole data on thousands of Ericsson US customers and employees, including names, payment, and medical details.

item.title: V-bucks are getting more X-pensive
item.description: Everything is more expensive now, even Fortnite's in-game currency. Starting on March 19th, V-bucks packs will include less of the premium currency at the same prices. For instance, players can currently get 1,000 V-bucks for $8.99, but after the price increases they will only get 800 V-bucks at the same rate. The price of exact […]

item.title: The twist in the Ticketmaster antitrust fight
item.description: A lot of people are mad at Ticketmaster, and have been for a long time. (Did Swifties directly create an antitrust trial? Discuss.) The US government's case against Live Nation-Ticketmaster appeared poised to lay bare some of the strangeness of the music business, and maybe even change the way the company works. And then, well, […]

item.title: Arnold Schwarzenegger Says He May Be Back for the Next ‘Predator’
item.description: Plus, 'The Hunt for Gollum' may have found another big star.

item.title: Yamaha launches Creator Pass for music makers and podcasters
item.description: Yamaha is taking a big leap into subscription services with its new Creator Pass, which bundles a bunch of different services and apps focused on music and podcast production under a single umbrella. Yamaha doesn't actually make much software of its own, so it's partnered with several other companies to help flesh out the bundle. […]

item.title: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to politicians and journalists
item.description: Public officials and journalists will soon be able to keep track of AI-generated deepfakes of themselves on YouTube through the platform's likeness detection feature. The tool is already available to millions of content creators on YouTube, but beginning Tuesday, it will expand to a pilot group of journalists, government officials, and political candidates. (At a […]...

item.title: YouTube expands AI deepfake detection for politicians, government officials, and journalists
item.description: YouTube's AI deepfake detection tool is becoming available to politicians, journalists, and officials, letting them flag unauthorized likenesses for removal.

item.title: The Future Games Show Spring Showcase airs this week — here's how to watch and what games to expect from the 90-minute presentation
item.description: The annual Future Games Show Spring showcase is scheduled to air this week and will feature all-new gameplay trailers for some of this year's upcoming games.

item.title: Mar10 Day is here, and these are the accessories, games, and merch I’m eyeing up as a life-long Nintendo fan
item.description: It’s Mar10 Day, and I feel bad for my wallet, because these accessories, games, and merch are about to rinse it dry.

item.title: SanDisk Extreme SSD deal: Amazon's Spring Sale slashes the price of one of my favourite rugged portable drives
item.description: Whether you are working outdoors or just surviving a particularly violent commute, this portable drive is an absolute steal right now.

item.title: Amazon retire 300 € à ce laptop 2-en-1 avec écran OLED et boosté par un Ryzen AI 7 350 pendant ses ventes flash de printemps
item.description: Le Lenovo Yoga 7 2-in-1 14AKP10 est un PC portable livré avec une belle fiche technique. Aujourd’hui, il devient moins cher en passant de 1 199 euros à 899 euros grâce à cette offre des ventes flash de printemps sur Amazon.

item.title: Test du Dyson PencilWash : faut-il acheter ce balai lavant ultra-léger ?
item.description: Un sabre laser de 2,1 kg qui lave vos sols : voilà la promesse du PencilWash. C'est beau, c'est fin, mais est-ce que ça vaut vraiment ses 350 euros ?

item.title: The Division 2 has set a new concurrent record on Steam, almost doubling its previous peak player count since 2019
item.description: Tom Clancy's The Division 2 has almost doubled its own all-time concurrent player record on Steam amid the series' 10th anniversary celebration.

item.title: Amazon Echo Dot Max : enfin une baisse de prix digne de ce nom grâce aux ventes flash de printemps
item.description: Amazon profite de ses ventes flash du printemps pour enfin offrir une promotion considérable à l'une de ses dernières enceintes connectées, l'Echo Dot Max. Elle passe de 109 euros à seulement 74,99 euros.

item.title: Une IA qui « voit » le monde : le pari à 1 milliard de dollars de Yann LeCun
item.description: Nvidia, Jeff Bezos, Samsung, Xavier Niel… Yann LeCun, ancien chef de l'IA chez Meta et un des « parrains » de l'intelligence artificielle moderne, a rassemblé une troupe hétéroclite autour de sa nouvelle start-up, AMI (pour Advanced Machine Intelligence). La jeune pousse a réalisé un tour de table initial de 1 milliard de dollars, une des plus importantes levées de fond en Europe au service d'une IA différente des grands modèles de langage....

item.title: Sonos just launched Play, a new $299 portable speaker
item.description: Sonos is returning to focus on the system that made it a driving force in whole-home audio. And to support that system, it's releasing its first new consumer speakers since 2024, the Sonos Play and Era 100 SL, which join the Amp Multi that the company recently announced for custom installs. The $299 Play is […]

item.title: 'I can imagine it being absolutely dreamy during a heatwave' — Shark just launched a personal misting fan that you can wear, clip on your bike, or take to the gym
item.description: The Shark ChillPill is a step above basic handheld fans that move warm air around, and has a clever cooling plate for instant relief on pulse points.

item.title: The Sonos Play puts the best parts of the Era 100 in a portable speaker
item.description: Sonos has just announced its first new products since 2024, when the company’s plans went sideways after a disastrous update to its app. First up is the Sonos Play, the company’s latest portable speaker. Long-time Sonos watchers will recognize the name from the old Play:1, Play:3 and Play:5 speakers, but this new model has little to do with those products of the past. The $299 Play is a Wi-Fi and Bluetooth speaker that sits between the $179 Roam 2 and $499 Move 2 and could be the “goldilocks” speaker in the company’s portable lineup, at least based on what I know so far.The closest comparison ...

item.title: Ces 3 opérateurs mobiles vont facturer la résiliation de leurs forfaits, vers la fin du changement gratuit ?
item.description: Emboîtant le pas à B&YOU, trois autres opérateurs de téléphonie mobile annoncent l'arrivée de frais de résiliation sur leurs forfaits sans engagement.

item.title: iRobot’s Roomba Mini can clean where its larger robovacs can’t reach
item.description: iRobot has announced its first new robot since the company filed for bankruptcy last December and was later acquired by China's Picea Robotics. At just 9.5-inches in diameter, the new Roomba Mini is half the size of iRobot's entry-level 105 series robovacs that launched last March, allowing the vacuum to access and clean spaces that […]

item.title: I searched the entire Amazon Spring Sale — these 9 gaming laptop deals are the ones actually worth buying
item.description: On the hunt for a new gaming laptop? Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale is particularly good for discounts today.

item.title: Adobe is debuting an AI assistant for Photoshop
item.description: Adobe is also adding new AI-powered image editing features to Firefly.

item.title: Achingly Sad Video Documents First-Known Case of Red Fox Attacking a Wolf Pup
item.description: The incident was likely an opportunistic kill, with the fox preying on the small pup to possibly threaten the survival of the predator species.

item.title: 33 home office upgrades under £50: I hunted through Amazon's Spring Sale to find the essential business gear for organising your workspace
item.description: Spring clean your desk - these bargain home office accessories are perfect for productivity.

item.title: MacBook Neo Review: No Other Budget Laptop Can Compete
item.description: The MacBook Neo isn't trying to be anything but what it is—a solid MacBook experience for $600.

item.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Rocks
item.description: Ryan Gosling stars in the new Andy Weir adaptation from directors Phil Lord and Chris Miller, out March 20.

item.title: Google Docs : Gemini va enfin pouvoir faire le sale boulot à votre place
item.description: Google vient de dévoiler les nouvelles fonctionnalités Gemini à venir dans Google Workspace. L’assistant IA de Google va se transformer en un collaborateur actif pour vous soulager des tâches ingrates.

item.title: Apple MacBook Neo Review: Delicious, Low-Hanging Fruit
item.description: At $599, the MacBook Neo is Apple’s first budget laptop. For the most part, Apple cut corners in the right places and made a MacBook its intended buyers will adore.

item.title: I Used Google’s New Gemini-Powered ‘Help Me Create’ Tool in Docs. It’s Great at Corporate-Speak
item.description: Google has injected Docs, Drive, Sheets, and Slides with its Gemini assistant, adding new features that can pull information from your emails and the web to help you draft content. I gave it a whirl.

item.title: Google’s Gemini AI is getting a bigger role across Docs, Sheets, and Slides
item.description: Google is embedding its Gemini AI assistant even more deeply within its Workspace apps. The changes, which are rolling out to Google Workspace and AI plan subscribers, include a new Gemini chat window inside Google Docs, a way to generate entire spreadsheets with AI, and a new Gemini-powered search feature in Drive. While Google Docs […]

item.title: MacBook Neo review: the Mac for the masses
item.description: The MacBook Neo is basically the M1 MacBook Air all over again. That laptop changed the game in 2020, and became the default option for just about anyone who wanted a great all-around thin-and-light laptop and could spend $1,000. The M1 Air was good enough that you could still buy a new one until last […]

item.title: Project Hail Mary is popcorn sci-fi at its best
item.description: Have you ever wondered what Arrival would be like if it was also a goofy buddy comedy? Me neither. And yet the strange combination somehow fits together in Project Hail Mary. The movie follows a scientist who travels to the far reaches of the universe to save humanity and is forced to work alongside an […]

item.title: Zoom introduces an AI-powered office suite, says AI avatars for meetings arrive this month
item.description: Zoom is also introducing a real-time deepfake detection tech for meetings

item.title: Google rolls out new Gemini capabilities to Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Drive
item.description: The idea behind the new features is to make the apps more personal and capable to help users get things done faster, right within the platforms themselves.

item.title: Hyperscale Power is the latest startup to challenge 140-year-old transformer tech
item.description: Startup Hyperscale Power is developing technology that promises to shrink power transformers, freeing up precious space within data centers.

item.title: This SpaceX veteran says the next big thing in space is satellites that return to Earth
item.description: The company's first demonstration mission is expected in early 2027.

item.title: 'The real story there is we just changed too much too fast': Sonos CEO Tom Conrad explains what went wrong with the disastrous app update, what still bugs him about it, and how he's fixing things
item.description: 'If I'm candid…' —Tom Conrad hopes to restore your trust in where Sonos is going

item.title: Sonos launches a new portable Play speaker and a cheaper Era 100 — CEO Tom Conrad explains why the new model is 'the Goldilocks perfect speaker'
item.description: Sonos CEO Tom Conrad talks me through the new Sonos Play and the impressively cheap Sonos Era 100 SL.

item.title: Project Hail Mary review: Ryan Gosling's new sci-fi movie is a mesmerizing and profoundly moving near-masterpiece that needs to be seen on the biggest screen possible
item.description: Ryan Gosling has never been better in Amazon's superb sci-fi spectacle — but his adorable alien companion Rocky is the film's real show-stealer.

item.title: Apple MacBook Neo: the best budget laptop you can buy
item.description: The MacBook Neo might be Apple’s most exciting MacBook launch for years — but have too many compromises been made to keep the price down?

item.title: MacBook Neo review: Apple puts every $600 Windows PC to shame
item.description: I really don't know how Apple did it. The MacBook Neo is a $600 laptop that doesn't feel like an afterthought, which is a curse that has befallen so many cheap Windows notebooks. Sure, it has a slower A-series processor and it's limited to 8GB of RAM. But the MacBook Neo still feels as deeply considered as Apple's most premium hardware. Its screen, trackpad and overall usability is so far ahead of the competition, every Windows PC maker, including Microsoft, should be ashamed. I've argued that a cheap MacBook could be the best for Apple to peel away Windows users, and after spending almost a ...

item.title: 6 reasons to apply to Fast Company’s 2026 Best Workplaces for Innovators
item.description: In addition to the ranked list of Best Workplaces for Innovators, our eighth annual feature will recognize outstanding companies in 19 categories. A streamlined application makes it easier than ever to apply to Fast Company’s Best Workplaces for Innovators. Here are six reasons why you should apply to our eighth annual BWFI program.

item.title: Sonos has a plan to make you love its speaker system again
item.description: After a rough couple of years, Sonos is on a mission to earn back trust. CEO Tom Conrad and CMO Colleen DeCourcy tell Fast Company how they’re making the Sonos system the star of the show. Few brands can point to a specific date for their downfall. For Sonos—once the darling of home audio—that date is May 7, 2024, when it rolled out a disastrous app update that left many of its 15 million customers confused by hardware and software features that were suddenly unusable. When all was said and done, more than a decade of brand trust was flipped like an off switch....

item.title: Google’s Gemini AI wants to do the busywork in Docs and Sheets
item.description: New Workspace features let Gemini generate documents from existing files, analyze spreadsheets from plain-language prompts, and update presentations automatically. Google is rolling out new AI features designed to quickly flesh out Google Docs, Sheets, and Slides using data from the web and your existing Google files.The overall aim is to eliminate much of the busywork involved in filling out templated documents, transferring data from saved files or internet sources into spreadsheets, and tweaking slide presentations to add new facts and figures—all while reflecting the personal and professio...

item.title: Prise en main | Le MacBook Neo en digne successeur du MacBook et de l’iBook
item.description: Le MacBook Neo. On en parlait depuis l’été dernier et le voilà enfin. Un Mac d’entrée de gamme qui est au MacBook Pro à processeur Apple Silicon ce que l’iBook du début des années 2000 était au bon vieux PowerBook. Une version plus colorée, plus ludique et probablement plus adaptée aux besoins de la majorité des acheteurs d’un portable d’Apple.

item.title: Xbox's next-gen Project Helix may cost over $1,000, despite Microsoft's reassurance that it will 'always' invest in gaming
item.description: Xbox's Project Helix high price predictions may not sit well with consumers, despite Microsoft CEO's reassurances for gamers.
